questionHtml: Explain why the equation will have at least one real root for all values of q.
markschemeHtml:
complex roots appear in conjugate pairs (so if complex roots occur the other root will be real OR all 3 roots will be real).

OR

a cubic curve always crosses the x-axis at at least one point.       R1

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: Explain why the equation will have at least one real root for all values of q.
